vector_metrics.basis: S_t reprojected from MODEL_WEIGHTS (fatigue+tactical+psychology); L_t mu_bias from DC-lambda residuals, sigma_chaos from weather+referee

match_flow.text: Attacking substitutions as both benches go for it

risk_factors: Model confidence is modest (13/100) — wide outcome spread.

reasons: Argentina grades higher on form & big-match composure (33% vs 33%).
Current form favours Argentina — group record 5W-0D-0L (+16 Elo) vs France 6W-0D-0L (+40).
explainability.why_penalties: A shootout is unlikely (17%) — one side should settle it inside 120'.
explainability.what_could_change: An early goal swings momentum; an injury to Argentina's key creator, or France stealing a set-piece, flips it.
